images.prompt: Clean medical diagram comparing three drug administration routes side by side. Left: oral route showing pill going to stomach then liver then bloodstream. Middle: transdermal route showing patch on skin absorbing directly to bloodstream. Right: injection route showing syringe into muscle directly to bloodstream. Simple arrows and organ outlines, minimal clean style.
images.alt: 雌二醇三种给药途径对比图：口服经肝脏代谢、透皮直接吸收、注射直达血液

images.prompt: Clean medical diagram showing cross-section of skin layers with two injection techniques side by side. Left side: subcutaneous injection with needle at 45 degree angle going into fat layer beneath skin. Right side: intramuscular injection with needle at 90 degree angle going deeper into muscle layer. Show labeled layers: epidermis, dermis, subcutaneous fat, muscle. Simple anatomical line drawing.
images.alt: 皮下注射（45°）与肌肉注射（90°）角度对比的皮肤截面解剖图

images.prompt: Clean medical diagram showing Tanner breast development stages I through V as five simple side-view silhouette outlines progressing from left to right. Stage I is flat, gradually developing through stages II-IV, to fully developed stage V. Simple line art outlines only, medical textbook style, arranged horizontally with progression arrow.
images.alt: Tanner 乳房发育分期 I-V 期的简洁轮廓线条图

images.prompt: Clean medical diagram showing three blood collection tubes side by side. Left: purple/lavender cap tube for complete blood count. images.prompt: Step-by-step medical instruction diagram showing how to reconstitute a lyophilized powder injection. Show 5 clear numbered steps in a horizontal flow with arrows between them: Step 1: Two vials side by side - left vial labeled 'Diluent' with clear liquid, right vial labeled 'Powder' with white powder. Step 2: A syringe drawing liquid from the diluent vial. Step 3: The syringe injecting the liquid into the powder vial. Step 4: Gentle swirling motion arrows around the powder vial showing dissolution, liquid now clear. Step 5: The syringe drawing the reconstituted clear solution from the vial, ready for injection. Clean simple line art, numbered 1-2-3-4-5, educational medical illustration style.
images.alt: GnRH reconstitution steps: draw diluent, inject into powder vial, swirl to dissolve, draw solution, ready to inject
